codeReview.summary: The change correctly removes the spurious `needs_errors` toggle from Result return signature emission while leaving the real `errors.New(...)` emission sites intact. The added regression test exercises the target scenario end-to-end and verifies the generated Go still uses `error` in signatures without importing `errors` when no Err construction occurs.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit `e8740d3`. The implementation matches the feature requirements and I found no high-confidence actionable bugs or shared-state gaps for this feature.
